web.title: Cove Miami
web.description: Set on Biscayne Bay, The Cove Residences offers contemporary waterfront homes with ocean, bay, and skyline views.
web.markdown:
Sound:OnOff

OFFICIAL SITE

[INTRODUCTION](https://covemia.com/#introduction) [RESIDENCES](https://covemia.com/#residences) [LOCATION](https://covemia.com/#location)

INTRODUCTION

The Cove Residences:

A Waterfront Collection

![](https://covemia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Building-Exterior-Sunset-Cove-Miami-Residences.jpg)

![Button](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

INTRODUCTION

The Cove Residences:

A Waterfront Collection

Rising directly on the Biscayne Bay waterfront, The Cove Residences introduces a new standard of understated luxury along Edgewater’s serene shoreline—just moments from Miami’s most prominent business and cultural destinations.

Conceived by Kobi Karp Architecture with interiors by Dieguez Fridman, this striking, soaring tower holds just 134 refined homes, each framed by sweeping ocean, bay, and skyline views.

From rooftop to bayfront, a comprehensive indoor-outdoor amenity collection supports life in balance.

[VIEW FACT SHEET](https://covemia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/SBD-TheCoveResidences-FactSheet.pdf)

![](https://covemia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Building-Exterior-Sunset-Full-Cove-Miami-Residences.jpg)

![](https://covemia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Hero-Building-Sunset-Cove-Miami-Residences.jpg)

01

Understated luxury meets

effortless Miami access

![Button](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

![](https://covemia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Pool-Cove-Miami-Residences-updated.jpg)

02

A private sanctuary

shaped for ease

![Button](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

![](https://covemia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Couple-Looking-Out-Cove-Miami-Residences.jpg)

03

Move to the rhythm of the bay

and the city beyond

![Button](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

RESIDENCES

Residences of

Light and Space

![](https://covemia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Interior-Livingroom-Cove-Miami-Residencesupdated.jpg)

![Button](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

RESIDENCES

Residences of

Light and Space

Refined living begins in thoughtfully composed residences defined by light and space. Each of just 134 residences in Cove’s tower is designed to feel calm, private, and expansive. Floor-to-ceiling glass and deep terraces invite sky and bay into daily life.

Interiors are elegant yet welcoming, with ten- foot ceilings, generous entertaining spaces, and natural materials that ground the home.

Custom kitchens, spa-like baths, and tailored details throughout create a quiet sense of ease — an atmosphere that feels considered, restorative, and distinctly elevated.

[VIEW FLOORPLANS](https://covemia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/TheCoveResidences-Floorplans.pdf)

![](https://covemia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Full-Interior-Livingroom-Cove-Miami-Residences-updated.jpg)

![](https://covemia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Building-Entrance-Updated-Cove-Miami-Residences.jpg)

![](https://covemia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Birdseye-Rendering-Cove-Miami-Residences-updated.jpg)

![](https://covemia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Lifestyle-Couch-Cove-Miami-Residences.jpg)

![](https://covemia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Kitchen-Rendering-Cove-Miami-Residences-updated.jpg)

![](https://covemia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Lifestyle-Pool-Cove-Miami-Residences.jpg)

![](https://covemia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Bedroom-Rendering-Cove-Miami-Residences-updated.jpg)

![](https://covemia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Building-Entrance-Updated-Cove-Miami-Residences.jpg)

![](https://covemia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Birdseye-Rendering-Cove-Miami-Residences-updated.jpg)

![](https://covemia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Lifestyle-Couch-Cove-Miami-Residences.jpg)

![](https://covemia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Kitchen-Rendering-Cove-Miami-Residences-updated.jpg)

![](https://covemia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Lifestyle-Pool-Cove-Miami-Residences.jpg)

![](https://covemia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Bedroom-Rendering-Cove-Miami-Residences-updated.jpg)

![](https://covemia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Building-Entrance-Updated-Cove-Miami-Residences.jpg)

IMAGES 1/6

![](https://covemia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Location-Map-Updated-Cove-Miami-Residences.jpg)

![Button](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

LOCATION

Where Calm

Meets Culture

Edgewater, Wynwood, the Design District, and Downtown unfold around Cove Miami fostering a connected way of living — mornings along the bay, afternoons immersed in art and fashion, evenings shaped by dining and culture.

It’s a landscape where calm waterfront moments and creative energy exist in quiet balance.

The rhythm is unhurried yet cosmopolitan — a lifestyle defined by access, refinement, and a sense of belonging to Miami at its most considered.

![](https://covemia.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Location-Map-Updated-Full-Cove-Miami-Residences.jpg)

web.title: Cove Edgewater Residences | Condos For Sale & Prices
web.description: This 40-story building will offer 116 luxury condominium apartments with fantastic views of Biscayne Bay and downtown Miami, with 2-4 bedroom configurations.
web.markdown:
![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/menubarmrg_bg2.png)

[![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/MRG-LOGO-White.png)](https://miamiresidential.com/)

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/Banner-The-Cove.jpg)

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/logo-the-cove-5.png)

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/01-The-Cove-Building.jpg)

# Cove Edgewater Miami Residences

### **Midtown - Edgewater / 2028**

40 Stories / 116 Residences of
2, 3 & 4 Bedrooms

**456 NE 29th St, Miami, FL 33137, USA**

Average Price: $1,000 x SF ($10,764 x M2)

Cove Residences Miami will be a spectacular condominium tower in the Edgewater area, one of the fastest growing areas of South Florida. This 40-story building will offer 116 luxury condominium apartments with fantastic views of Biscayne Bay and downtown Miami, with 2-4 bedroom configurations, super-luxury amenities with a rooftop pool, and much more.

[6 Condos For Sale](https://miamiresidential.com/covemiami#ForSale) from $895,000 to $3,595,000

Average Listing: $1,164 x SF ($12,531 x M2)

Average Price: $1,000 x SF ($10,764 x M2)

CONDOS FOR SALE

CONDOS FOR RENT

CONDOS SOLD/RENTED

FLOOR PLANS

## Prices & General Information

## Information & Prices

![05-The-Cove-Building](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/05-The-Cove-Building.jpg)

![02-The-Cove-Amenities](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/02-The-Cove-Amenities.jpg)

![08-The-Cove-Living.-and-Dining](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/08-The-Cove-Living.-and-Dining.jpg)

Architect/s: Kobi Karp + Dieguez Fridman

Developed by SB Development & Hazelton Capital Group

[6 Condos For Sale](https://miamiresidential.com/covemiami#ForSale) from $895,000 to $3,595,000

Average Listing: $1,164 x SF ($12,531 x M2)

Average Price: $1,000 x SF ($10,764 x M2)

## Features

### Building Features

- Three levels of amenities + rooftop overlooking Biscayne Bay
- Resort-style infinity pool with private cabanas
- Gym
- Spa with cold plunge pool
- Massage rooms, Turkish bath and sauna
- Clubroom
- Co-working area and meeting room
- Game room
- Owners lounge with wine cellar
- Pet spa
- Microcinema
- Dock for water sports
- Guest room
- Private wineries
- You can rent up to two times a year, with a minimum of three months
- Garage in the building, with valet parking for two cars

### Residence Features

- Fully finished units
- Floor to ceiling windows
- Balcony in all residences
- Kitchen counter in Calacatta gold marble
- Italian kitchen and bathroom cabinets
- Thermador and Bosch appliances
- Wine cooler in select units
- Marble bathrooms
- and more

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/03-The-Cove-Architecture-e1682304515445.jpg)

## Developers

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/Developer-SBD-and-Hazelton-Capital-Group.jpg)

SB Development is New York City-based real estate developer formed in 2010. SBD delivers a high level of finishes, appliances, and innovative details so owners can have the most up to date designs, technologies, and materials in their communities. Some of their most prestigious developments include The Dime Residences and NOVA

Hazelton Capital Group is a diversified real estate organization based in New York City. The firm’s strategy can be summarized as a rigorous study of economic cycles, which identifies arbitrages and opportunities in the market. Some of their most prestigious developments include The Printing House, One Morningside Park
